creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
As the new version of esecanna has introduced dynamic module loading mechanism, the port `esecanna-vje30' has to be split into two ports named `esecanna' and `esecanna-module-vje30'. I'm not sure if repo-copy of `esecanna-vje30' to `esecanna' is needed, but anyway `esecanna-vje30' shall be removed. Plus, I'd like to add a new port `esecanna-module-vje25', and as soon as esecanna-module-wnn6 comes out I'll port it too.
